faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Quick answers to help you decide.

whatIs.question: What is FeldOps?
whatIs.answer: FeldOps is an all-in-one platform for service businesses: workforce planning, field operations, finance, client portal, and AI assistant — in one system.

industries.question: What types of companies is it for?
industries.answer: Cleaning companies, facility management, technical maintenance, and recurring service providers. If you have field teams and contract clients, FeldOps is built for you.

trial.question: Can I try before paying?
trial.answer: Yes. The Starter plan is free forever. Professional includes a 14-day trial with no credit card required.

data.question: Is my data secure?
data.answer: Yes. EU-hosted data, GDPR compliance, per-company isolation, and encryption in transit and at rest.

support.question: What support do you offer?
support.answer: Email support on all plans. Professional customers get priority. Enterprise includes a dedicated account manager and assisted onboarding.

migration.question: Can I migrate from another tool?
migration.answer: Yes. We help import clients, employees, and contracts. Our team guides you through initial setup.

cta.title: Ready to run your entire business in one place?
cta.description: Join hundreds of service companies that simplified operations, finance, and client relationships.

footer.tagline: The operational platform for service businesses and facility management.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How FeldOps collects, uses, and protects personal data when you use our B2B field service platform.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
paragraphs: FeldOps GmbH (placeholder — update with your registered legal entity) is the data controller for personal data processed through the FeldOps platform at feldops.com and related services.
Contact for privacy matters: privacy@feldops.com

sections.title: 2. Scope and roles
paragraphs: FeldOps is a business-to-business SaaS product. Your organization (the customer) is typically the data controller for employee, client, and operational data you enter into the workspace. FeldOps acts as a data processor for that content under your instructions and our Data Processing Agreement (DPA), where applicable.
FeldOps is an independent controller for account, billing, security, and product analytics data necessary to operate the service.

sections.title: 3. Categories of data we process
paragraphs: Account data: name, email, role, authentication identifiers, and company affiliation.
Operational data: tasks, schedules, clients, addresses, photos, reports, and audit logs submitted by your team.
Technical data: IP address, device/browser metadata, session cookies, and error logs for security and reliability.
Billing data: subscription plan, payment status, and billing contact details (payment card data is handled by Stripe, not stored on our servers).

sections.title: 4. Purposes and legal bases (GDPR)
paragraphs: We process data to provide and improve the service (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — contract performance).
We process security and fraud-prevention logs (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — legitimate interests).
We send essential service communications without marketing consent (Art. 6(1)(b)/(f) GDPR).
Where required, we rely on consent for non-essential cookies or optional communications (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

sections.title: 5. Sub-processors and international transfers
paragraphs: We use infrastructure and service providers including Supabase (database, auth, storage) and Stripe (payments). Sub-processors are bound by data protection agreements.
Data is primarily hosted in the European Union. If data is transferred outside the EEA, we implement appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses.

sections.title: 6. Retention
paragraphs: We retain personal data for as long as your account is active and as needed to provide the service, comply with law, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
After account termination, workspace data is deleted or anonymized within a reasonable period unless longer retention is required by law or backup cycles.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on applicable law (GDPR, LGPD where relevant), you may have rights to access, rectify, erase, restrict, port, or object to processing, and to withdraw consent where processing is consent-based.
EU/EEA users may lodge a complaint with their local supervisory authority. Requests: privacy@feldops.com — we respond within statutory timeframes.

sections.title: 8. Security
paragraphs: We apply technical and organizational measures including encryption in transit, role-based access control, tenant isolation, and audit logging. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure; we continuously improve our controls.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms governing access to and use of the FeldOps platform by businesses and authorized users.

sections.title: 1. Agreement
paragraphs: These Terms of Service ("Terms") form a binding agreement between FeldOps GmbH ("FeldOps", "we") and the legal entity registering for or using the service ("Customer", "you").
By creating an account, accepting an invite, or using FeldOps, you confirm that you have authority to bind your organization and agree to these Terms.

sections.title: 2. Service description
paragraphs: FeldOps provides cloud software for field service operations including task management, workforce coordination, reporting, and related features as described on our website and in your subscription plan.
We may update features for improvement, security, or compliance. Material adverse changes to core functionality will be communicated with reasonable notice where practicable.

sections.title: 3. Accounts and acceptable use
paragraphs: You are responsible for accurate registration information, safeguarding credentials, and all activity under your workspace.
You must not misuse the service: no unlawful content, reverse engineering, interference with other tenants, circumvention of plan limits, or use that violates third-party rights.
You ensure that data you upload (including employee and client data) is collected and used in compliance with applicable privacy laws.

sections.title: 4. Subscriptions, trials, and billing
paragraphs: Paid plans, seat limits, and usage quotas are defined at checkout and in your plan documentation. Trials convert to paid subscriptions unless cancelled before the trial ends.
Fees are billed in advance via Stripe unless otherwise agreed. Taxes may apply. Failure to pay may result in suspension after notice.
Refunds are handled according to applicable consumer/business law and our billing policy stated at purchase.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual property
paragraphs: FeldOps retains all rights in the platform, branding, and documentation. You receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the service during an active subscription.
You retain ownership of your operational data. You grant FeldOps a license to host, process, and display that data solely to provide the service.

sections.title: 6. Confidentiality and data protection
paragraphs: Each party will protect the other's confidential information with reasonable care.
Where FeldOps processes personal data on your behalf, our Data Processing Agreement and Privacy Policy apply.

sections.title: 7. Availability and disclaimers
paragraphs: We strive for high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted service. Maintenance windows and force majeure may cause temporary disruption.
The service is provided "as is" to the maximum extent permitted by law. We disclaim implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement where allowed.

sections.title: 8. Liability and termination
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by law, neither party is liable for indirect or consequential damages. Our aggregate liability is limited to fees paid by you in the twelve months preceding the claim.

Either party may terminate for material breach if uncured within 30 days of notice. You may cancel subscriptions per billing terms. Upon termination, access ends and data export/deletion follows our retention policy.

sections.title: 9. Governing law
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of Germany, excluding conflict-of-law rules. Courts in Berlin, Germany shall have exclusive jurisdiction for business customers, unless mandatory law provides otherwise.
Questions: legal@feldops.com

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.description: Legal notice pursuant to § 5 TMG (Germany) and applicable EU information requirements.

paragraphs: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr
We are not obliged or willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board unless required by law.

sections.title: Liability for content and links
paragraphs: We carefully create content on these pages but assume no liability for accuracy, completeness, or timeliness.
Our site may contain links to external websites. We have no influence over their content and accept no liability. The respective provider is responsible for linked pages.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Information about cookies and similar technologies used on the FeldOps website and application.

sections.title: 1. What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. Similar technologies include local storage and session storage used for authentication state.

sections.title: 2. How we use cookies
paragraphs: Strictly necessary cookies: required for login sessions, security, locale preference, and active company selection. These cannot be disabled without breaking core functionality.
Functional cookies: remember UI preferences and improve usability.
Analytics cookies (if enabled): help us understand aggregate usage to improve the product. We use privacy-respecting configuration and avoid unnecessary tracking.

sections.title: 3. Third-party cookies
paragraphs: Payment checkout may set cookies from Stripe when you complete a subscription.
Authentication and hosting providers (e.g. Supabase) may set session-related cookies during sign-in.

sections.title: 4. Managing cookies
paragraphs: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking strictly necessary cookies may prevent you from signing in or using the application.
For questions: privacy@feldops.com

forecastPage.description: Revenue forecast based on recurring contracts and receivables, with projected costs and margin.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Configure Trigger → Condition → Action flows to automate operations and communications.

channels.title: Delivery channels
channels.hint: Architecture ready for external provider integration.

rules.title: Configured rules

actions.generateReportDesc: Generates service report and publishes to client portal

triggers.contractCreatedDesc: Fires when a new contract is created
triggers.invoiceOverdueDesc: Fires when invoice is past due
triggers.invoiceSentDesc: Fires when invoice is sent to client
triggers.leadQualifiedDesc: Fires when a lead is marked qualified
triggers.quoteSentDesc: Fires when a quote is sent to the customer
triggers.quoteSubmittedDesc: Fires when a quote enters internal review
triggers.quoteApprovedDesc: Fires when a quote is accepted/approved
triggers.shiftEmptyDesc: Fires when a task has no assigned employee
triggers.weeklyHoursExceededDesc: Fires when an employee exceeds weekly contract hours

form.name: Name
form.noConditions: No conditions — runs whenever the trigger fires.

aiAssistant.title: AI Operations Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Optimize schedules, allocate workforce, estimate costs, predict delays, and generate quotes and reports using your company context.

chat.title: Ask the assistant
chat.placeholder: E.g. How can we reduce delays this week?
chat.hint: Answers are based on your operational data. Without an OpenAI key, a rules engine is used.

capabilities.optimizeSchedulesDesc: Suggests redistribution of visits and shifts for the week.
capabilities.suggestWorkforceDesc: Recommends assignments based on workload and availability.
capabilities.estimateCostsDesc: Projects costs and revenue from contracts and operations.
capabilities.predictDelaysDesc: Identifies delay risks in tasks and visits.
capabilities.generateQuotesDesc: Draft quote based on active portfolio.
capabilities.generateReportsDesc: Executive summary for clients or internal management.
capabilities.analyzeProductivityDesc: Evaluates completion rate, on-time delivery, and utilization.
